cards.title: Testosterone & Hormones
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • ADAM questionnaire (Androgen Deficiency in Aging Males)
  • Total T: 300–1000 ng/dL, Free T: 9–30 pg/mL
  • Testosterone optimisation: Zinc, Ashwagandha, D3, sleep
  • SHBG: Binds testosterone, fibre & weight training lower it

cards.title: Erectile Dysfunction & Sexual Health
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • ED: Vascular vs neurogenic vs psychogenic
  • PDE5 inhibitors + naturopathic (L-arginine 5g, Pycnogenol, MACA)
  • Premature ejaculation: Mindfulness, squeeze technique
  • Fertility: Sperm analysis interpretation

cards.title: Prostate & Fertility
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • BPH: Saw palmetto 320mg, beta-sitosterol, nettle root
  • PSA interpretation: Velocity >0.75 ng/mL/yr = concerning
  • Male infertility: CoQ10 200mg BD, folate, zinc, selenium
  • Varicocele: Surgical vs conservative management
